Hero.badge: One network for modern supply distribution
Hero.subtitle: Bananay connects producers, truck drivers, local distribution hubs, couriers and delivery points into one coordinated delivery network across Greater Sochi.
Hero.promiseHead: Producers no longer have to build their own delivery department.
Hero.promiseText: No need to keep a private fleet, hire in-house drivers or manually coordinate movement from factory to store.
Hero.regionText: Map block appears below on the landing page to show the first active region.

Value.label: Why this platform exists
Value.title: Logistics without building your own fleet and operations team.
Value.text: Producers focus on products; Bananay handles the movement of goods through a distributed delivery network.
items: No need to keep your own drivers and trucks
One connected delivery chain from producer to point of sale
Built for supply distribution, not parcel shipping
Transparent stages for every participant in the network

HowItWorks.label: How it works
HowItWorks.title: One network. Five roles. One delivery chain.

producer.title: Producer
producer.text: Creates a shipment request and no longer needs to manage a private fleet or delivery operations alone.

truck.title: Truck
truck.text: Moves larger cargo batches from producers to the nearest distribution point.

hub.title: Hub
hub.text: Receives, scans and redistributes goods. A hub can be a smaller local facility, not only a huge warehouse.

courier.title: Courier
courier.text: Handles the final route to stores, cafés and restaurants with smaller vehicles and batches.

tracking.title: Tracking
tracking.text: Lets delivery points see what stage their order is currently in.

Apps.label: Apps and entry points
Apps.title: Five apps, all connected to one logistics service.
Apps.text: One platform with different roles and direct links into each application.

producer.label: For manufacturers
producer.title: Producer App
producer.text: Create shipments and stop worrying about building your own delivery operations.

truck.label: For long-haul movement
truck.title: Truck Driver App
truck.text: Move goods from producers to hubs across the launch region.

hub.label: For local facilities
hub.title: Distribution Hub App
hub.text: Receive, sort and prepare shipments for the next stage in the chain.

courier.label: For last-mile delivery
courier.title: Courier App
courier.text: Deliver smaller batches to stores, cafés and restaurants.

tracking.label: For delivery points
tracking.title: Tracking App
tracking.text: Monitor order status and see what stage the delivery is in right now.

Region.label: Launch region
Region.title: Starting with Greater Sochi.
Region.text: The first network is being built here. The MVP has a real geographical anchor.

CTA.label: Get started
CTA.title: Build your delivery chain without building it alone.
CTA.text: Producers, hubs, drivers, couriers and delivery points can all become part of one coordinated network.

Footer.tagline: One network for supply distribution. Producers, drivers, hubs, couriers — connected.

PartnershipModal.title: Join the Bananay network
PartnershipModal.intro: Leave a quick request and we'll get back to you as we expand the network in your region.
PartnershipModal.formIntro: This form is for everyone — hubs, drivers, couriers, logistics partners or anyone interested in supporting the Bananay network.
PartnershipModal.name: Full name
PartnershipModal.participate: How do you want to participate? (courier, hub, driver, logistics partner...)
PartnershipModal.details: Tell us briefly about your vehicle, facility, route, company or partnership interest
